basic_details.job_title: JMI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Academic Lead, Coordinator Posts
basic_details.short_information: Candidates should download and read the JMI Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's/Master's degree with 55% marks (or equivalent grade) in concerned/relevant/allied subject from an Indian University.
qualification.details: Academic Lead: Bachelor's/Master's degree with 55% marks (or equivalent grade) in concerned/relevant/allied subject from an Indian University. Appeared for UPSC Civil Services Personality Test (Interview). Desirable: Experience of mentoring Civil Services aspirants. Coordinator: Bachelor's/Master's degree with 55% marks (or equivalent grade) in concerned/relevant/allied subject from an Indian University. Appeared in UPSC Civil Services/State PSC Main Examination. Desirable: Administrative experience in UPSC Coaching Institute.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JMI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://jmi.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 14-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JMI Academic Lead & Coordinator posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the JMI Academic Lead & Coordinator posts is 14th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's or Master's degree with at least 55% marks in a relevant subject from a recognized Indian University. Specific criteria apply for each post as detailed in the notification.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Academic Lead & Coordinator positions?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced by Jamia Millia Islamia for the Academic Lead and Coordinator positions. One vacancy is for Academic Lead and the other is for Coordinator.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for the JMI recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 300/-. No application fee is mentioned for other categories in the provided data.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Academic Lead & Coordinator posts will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 60,000/- to Rs. 70,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for JMI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it via post to the specified address.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Academic Lead & Coordinator posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a screening of applications followed by an interview. Candidates are advised to prepare well for both stages.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Jamia Millia Islamia, which is https://jmi.ac.in.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any desirable qualifications mentioned for the posts?
faq.answer: Yes, for the Academic Lead post, experience in mentoring Civil Services aspirants is desirable. For the Coordinator post, administrative experience in a UPSC Coaching Institute is desirable.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Jamia Millia Islamia recruitment is 02/2026-27.
